title: critic
description: Critic score and structured feedback consumed by the placement agent.

pass.description: Whether the assembly meets the quality bar.

summary.description: One-line summary of the main problems.

component.description: Part name the issue applies to.

locked.description: True only if placement, scale (dimensions vs source), and collision-free contact are all correct; placement must not change this component.

problem.description: What is wrong with this component's placement.

axis.description: Axis the correction should act on, if applicable.

direction.description: Direction of the correction along axis, if applicable.

suggested_rotation_delta.description: Suggested rotation change in degrees [dx, dy, dz], added to rotation.

per_view_notes.description: Free-form notes keyed by render view name.
